mapper.select: select r.code from dm_system.sys_user_role ur join dm_system.sys_role r on ur.role_id = r.id where ur.user_id = #{userId}
select bd.building_id from dm_business.building_dm bd left join dm_business.dm_room r on r.id = bd.building_id and r.delflag = 0 where bd.dm_id = #{dmId} and bd.is_current = 1

select cs.student_id from dm_business.class_teacher ct left join dm_business.class_student cs on cs.class_id = ct.class_id where ct.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and ct.is_current = 1 and cs.is_current = 1
select rs.room_id from dm_business.room_student rs left join dm_business.dm_room r on r.id = rs.room_id and r.delflag = 0 where rs.student_id = #{studentId} and rs.is_current = 1
